articles.title: 36氪首发 | 牛津博士后跨界创业融资两轮，用光学重构机器人传感器
articles.summary: 2024年成立于上海的智子力控，由牛津博士后跨界创立，基于光学传感技术为人形机器人等提供分布式力觉感知解决方案，近日完成中芯聚源独家投资的新一轮融资，加上此前融资累计达千万级别，资金将用于研发、产线建设及团队扩充，目前已对接国内多家人形机器人头部企业。

articles.title: 36氪专访 | 前小米高管王腾的下一站：从睡眠入手，抓住AI硬件十年一遇的创业窗口
articles.summary: 前小米高管王腾抓住AI硬件十年一遇的创业窗口，离职后切入睡眠赛道创业，成立品牌今日宜休，定位为以睡眠为切口的精力资产管理生态公司，目前已累计获得上亿元融资，计划推出软硬结合、从监测到干预的睡眠健康闭环产品，项目仍处于早期阶段。

articles.title: 伊朗战事实时更新：海峡局势存疑 黎巴嫩遇袭 停火经受考验
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: Cease-Fire Tested by Confusion Over Strait and Strikes on Lebanon
articles.summary: 当前霍尔木兹海峡局势仍不明朗，美伊双方官员均放话，若停火破裂将重启攻击。目前停火正因海峡局势的不确定性以及黎巴嫩遇袭事件经受考验，但美伊两国其实都有理由希望停火能够持续维持。
articles.summary_original: Even as the status of the Strait of Hormuz remained unclear and U.S. and Iranian officials issued dueling threats to resume attacks if the cease-fire fell apart, both countries had reason to hope it held together.

articles.title: 春假催热旅游市场 多业态联动释放消费活力 - 人民网财经
articles.summary: 春假与清明假期连放后，国内多地旅游客流激增、消费大幅上涨，此次假日经济备受多家媒体关注。各方盘点本次清明春假文旅市场，指出春假直接催热旅游市场，多业态联动有效激活释放消费活力，同时也引发对如何延续假日消费效应的讨论。

articles.title: 开创性野生动物摄像师道格·艾伦在尼泊尔逝世
articles.title_original: Pioneering wildlife cameraman Doug Allan dies in Nepal
articles.summary: 知名开创性野生动物摄像师、摄影师道格·艾伦在尼泊尔离世。他曾与大卫·爱登堡爵士合作，为《蓝色星球》等广受好评的自然系列作品拍摄，职业生涯共斩获八座艾美奖，是自然影视领域极具影响力的先驱。
articles.summary_original: The cameraman and photographer won eight Emmy Awards for his work on acclaimed series like Blue Planet alongside Sir David Attenborough.

articles.title: 万斯将牵头伊朗问题会谈 德黑兰称停火遭违反
articles.title_original: Vance to Lead Iran Talks, Tehran Says Ceasefire Violated
articles.summary: 彭博社消息，德黑兰称停火协议遭违反，当前中东地区战事仍持续未停，美国白宫已正式宣布，美国将与伊朗举行直接会谈，由美国副总统JD·万斯率领美方代表团前往伊斯兰堡开展此次会谈。
articles.summary_original: The White House has announced the US would hold direct talks with Iran, with Vice President JD Vance leading an American delegation to Islamabad, despite continued fighting in the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育省委督导组工作会议召开 - ln.gov.cn
articles.summary: 当前，树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育正有序推进，中央指导组已完成进驻，某省召开省委督导组工作会议部署相关工作，多地举办针对“一把手”的专题培训班，权威媒体解读相关要求，强调党员干部要练就担当本事，创造经得起检验的政绩。

articles.title: 习言道｜放下官架子、回归革命军人本色 - 中国网新闻中心
articles.summary: 中国网新闻中心推出题为《习言道｜放下官架子、回归革命军人本色》的相关报道，倡导相关人员摒弃官僚做派，坚守初心，回归革命军人本色，该报道的完整内容已上线Google新闻平台，感兴趣的读者可前往查看完整内容。

articles.title: 策略师称风险缓解与资金流入将推动韩元反弹
articles.title_original: Korean Won to Rally on Easing Risks and Inflows, Strategists Say
articles.summary: 策略师表示，受油价走低、外资流入韩国股市以及市场风险逐步缓解等因素推动，韩元有望在今年第二季度反弹至美伊冲突发生前的水平，上述因素共同构成了韩元回升的支撑动力。
articles.summary_original: The Korean won may rebound back to levels seen before the US-Iran war in the second quarter because of lower oil prices and foreign inflows to stocks, strategists said.

articles.title: 为何维持霍尔木兹自由贸易是美国谈判的关键
articles.title_original: Why Maintaining Free Hormuz Trade Is Key for US in Talks
articles.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡在美伊达成停火协议后，于周三仍基本处于封锁状态，仅观测到三艘船只驶出该区域。阿诺德·波特高级国际政策顾问芭芭拉·利夫探讨了重开海峡的重要性，以及美国维护该水道自由贸易与通航的核心利益。
articles.summary_original: The Strait of Hormuz remained largely blocked on Wednesday even after a ceasefire was agreed between the US and Iran, with just three ships observed leaving the region. Arnold & Porter Senior International Policy Advisor Barbara Leaf discusses the importance of reopening the Strait and explains why the US has a strong interest in preserving the waterway as a channel for free trade and navigation.

articles.title: 伊朗议长：伊美谈判尚未开始3项停战条款已遭违反--国际 - 人民网国际
articles.summary: 伊朗议长公开作出表态，伊朗与美国之间的相关谈判目前尚未正式启动，双方此前达成的三项停战条款已经遭到违反。该新闻由人民网国际频道发布，完整报道可前往Google新闻平台查看。

articles.title: 印度邦级选举考验莫迪对战争引发短缺问题的应对
articles.title_original: India State Polls Test Modi’s Handling of War-Driven Shortages
articles.summary: 印度多个关键邦即将迎来选举，这是印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪面临的一场关键选举考验。中东危机引发的烹饪燃气短缺与工业中断问题，莫迪对相关问题的处理成为本次选举的核心议题。
articles.summary_original: Prime Minister Narendra Modi faces a key electoral test as voters in key Indian states head to the polls, with his handling of cooking gas shortages and industrial disruptions triggered by the Middle East crisis emerging as a central issue.

articles.title: 8点1氪丨张雪机车LOGO被指抄袭；水贝商户称白银销量暴跌90%；GoPro将全球裁员23%
articles.summary: 4月8日多项热点出炉：张雪机车LOGO被指抄袭，设计方称将发布声明，张雪本人暂未回应；受金价波动影响，深圳水贝白银销量暴跌超90%；运动相机品牌GoPro宣布将在全球裁员23%以降低成本，此外还有国资委成立境外国资局、阿里调整AI架构等热点。

articles.title: Gemini推出笔记本功能助力项目整理
articles.title_original: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
articles.summary: 谷歌于周三宣布，旗下AI聊天工具Gemini新增名为“笔记本”的功能，该功能支持用户将文件、历史对话、自定义指令等同一主题内容整合在一处，整合内容可作为Gemini对话的上下文，帮助用户整理项目相关内容。
articles.summary_original: Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can then use as context while you're talking with […]

articles.title: 谷歌Gemini新增笔记本功能 助力用户整理项目
articles.title_original: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
articles.summary: 谷歌周三宣布，旗下AI聊天工具Gemini新增“笔记本”功能。该功能支持用户将文件、过往对话、自定义指令等特定主题相关内容整合在一处，用户对话时Gemini可将这些内容用作上下文，方便用户整理项目与相关内容。
articles.summary_original: Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can then use as context while you're talking with […]

articles.title: 高温持续！珠海本周气温升至“3”字头 - 珠海网
articles.summary: 近期我国南方多地出现持续高温天气，珠海本周气温已升至“3”字头，海南连续多日遭遇高温侵袭，多地气温超37℃，还叠加干旱灾害，影响当地农田、果园生产，多家媒体关注该异常天气，已有专家针对4月反常高温现象作出解读。

articles.title: 戴森推出其标志性风扇的手持版本
articles.title_original: Dyson made a handheld version of its iconic fans
articles.summary: 距离戴森首次发布空气倍增器风扇已过去近17年，该产品是戴森继吸尘器后推出的首批热门消费产品之一。戴森将该设计微型化，推出了名为HushJet Mini Cool的全新手持个人降温风扇，延续了戴森同系列大型产品的设计特点。
articles.summary_original: Nearly 17 years after Dyson first announced its Air Multiplier fans - one of its first big consumer products after vacuums - the company has miniaturized their design to create a handheld personal cooler called the HushJet Mini Cool. Like Dyson's larger Air Multipliers, humidifiers, air purifiers, and heaters, the HushJet Mini Cool doesn't have […]

articles.title: 通胀担忧加剧 泰国债券跌势料将加深
articles.title_original: Thailand’s Bond Slump Seen Deepening as Inflation Concerns Mount
articles.summary: 分析人士指出，伊朗冲突爆发以来，泰国主权债券已是全球表现最差的资产之一。当前通胀风险上升，叠加市场对泰国财政压力的担忧情绪升温，泰国债券将面临进一步损失。
articles.summary_original: Thailand’s sovereign bonds — among the world’s worst performers since the Iran war erupted — face more losses as rising inflation risks add to worries over fiscal strain, analysts say.

articles.title: 李佳琦哽咽宣布：将短暂退出直播，感谢支持尝试新挑战 - 中华网
articles.summary: 带货主播李佳琦在直播中哽咽宣布将短暂退出直播，相关发言引发其即将退休的猜测，随后他凌晨发文澄清，称此前发言存在口误，自己并非退休，仅缺席两个月直播，暂退期间将拍摄合伙人相关内容，尝试新挑战。

articles.title: 霍尔木兹海峡已再次关闭；国际油价大跌逾10%｜21早新闻- 21经济网 - 21财经
articles.summary: 中东局势近期再度升级，美伊和谈未谈先崩，双方此前达成的临时停火或因以色列破裂，霍尔木兹海峡再次关闭。受这一地缘事件影响，国际油价大幅下跌，跌幅超过10%，多家财经及资讯媒体已跟进报道此事。

articles.title: 新加坡要求政府部门严控空调使用
articles.title_original: Singapore Government Offices Told to Rein in Air-Conditioning
articles.summary: 受中东冲突影响，全球能源供应进一步收紧。为提升国家能源韧性，新加坡要求本国政府办公设施采取措施削减电力消耗，明确要求管控空调使用，以此降低用电量，应对当前全球能源供应紧张的形势。
articles.summary_original: Government facilities in Singapore will take steps to reduce electricity consumption to boost the nation’s energy resilience as the conflict in the Middle East tightens global energy supplies.

articles.title: 财经早知道｜习近平就服务业发展作出重要指示 - 财新
articles.summary: 多家主流媒体报道，习近平就服务业发展作出重要指示。服务业是与民众生活密切相关的百万亿级大产业，目前居民近半数支出用于服务消费，舆论强调要扎实推进该行业优质高效发展，当前我国服务业正处于扩能提质、乘势而上的发展阶段。

articles.title: 泰格·伍兹佛罗里达被捕后 检方申请调取其处方药物记录
articles.title_original: Prosecutors seek Tiger Woods' prescription drug records after Florida arrest
articles.summary: 泰格·伍兹此前在佛罗里达州被捕，据法庭文件披露，检方将在本月晚些时候签发法律令状，要求调取这位知名高尔夫球手的处方药物记录，内容涵盖药物具体用量，以及药瓶上标注的与驾车相关的警示信息。
articles.summary_original: A legal order seeking the golfer's medications - including dosage and warnings about driving on pill bottles - will be issued later this month, court record shows.

articles.title: 股市涨势遇挫 油价反弹打压市场情绪：市场综述
articles.title_original: Stock Rally Stumbles as Oil’s Rebound Damps Mood: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: 此前受美伊停火消息提振，全球股市迎来上涨。随后伊朗称停火协议多项条款已遭违反，凸显市场仍存不确定性，叠加油价反弹攀升，全球股市此前的涨势失去上涨动力。
articles.summary_original: A surge in global equities fueled by the US-Iran ceasefire lost momentum after Tehran said several terms of the agreement had been breached, highlighting lingering uncertainty in markets. Oil climbed.

articles.title: 霍尔木兹海峡仍受阻 油价在2020年以来最大跌幅后回升
articles.title_original: Oil Rises After Biggest Drop Since 2020 as Hormuz Stays Blocked
articles.summary: 油价在经历2020年4月以来的最大单日跌幅后反弹，目前霍尔木兹海峡仍基本堵塞，以色列袭击黎巴嫩威胁到中东本就脆弱的停火协议，地缘局势不确定性推动了本次油价回升。
articles.summary_original: Oil rebounded after its biggest one-day drop since April 2020, as the Strait of Hormuz remained largely blocked and Israeli attacks on Lebanon threatened to derail the fragile ceasefire in the Middle East.

articles.title: WireGuard VPN开发者因微软锁定账户无法推送软件更新
articles.title_original: WireGuard VPN developer can’t ship software updates after Microsoft locks account
articles.summary: 知名开源VPN工具WireGuard的开发者，成为第二个被微软未经通知就锁定账户的知名开发者。账户遭到锁定后，该开发者失去了向用户推送软件更新的权限，无法正常为用户提供软件更新服务。
articles.summary_original: The popular open source VPN maker is the second high-profile developer to say Microsoft locked his account without notifying him and is blocking their ability to send software updates to users.

articles.title: 德克萨斯一自动驾驶汽车撞死母鸭 引发社区愤怒
articles.title_original: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
articles.summary: 美国德克萨斯州奥斯汀附近，一辆Avride公司的自动驾驶车辆撞死一只母鸭，引发当地社区的不满与反对。有目击者称，事故发生时该车完全没有减速，也没有做出避让动作，直接碾过母鸭。
articles.summary_original: An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin hit the duck, facing backlash from the community. "It didn't slow down or hesitate at all, just steamrolled right through," according to a witness.

articles.title: 他曾是澳大利亚授勋最多的士兵 如今身陷历史性战争罪案件
articles.title_original: He's Australia's most decorated soldier. Now he's at the centre of a historic war crimes case
articles.summary: 本·罗伯茨-史密斯曾是澳大利亚获得勋章最多的军人，如今他身陷一桩历史性战争罪案件。历史学家指出，这起案件不仅在澳大利亚前所未有，放到全球范围来看，也是一起非同寻常的案件。
articles.summary_original: Ben Roberts-Smith's case is not only unprecedented for Australia but "extraordinary" for the globe too, historians say.

articles.title: AI智能体Poke让自动化设置如发信息般简单
articles.title_original: AI agent Poke makes setting up automations as easy as sending a text
articles.summary: 这款名为Poke的AI智能体面向普通日常用户，可通过短信为用户提供服务，帮用户处理任务、实现自动化操作。使用该服务无需复杂设置，不用下载额外应用，也不需要用户具备专业技术知识，大幅降低了AI自动化服务的使用门槛。
articles.summary_original: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

articles.title: AI智能体Poke让自动化设置如发短信般简单
articles.title_original: AI agent Poke makes setting up automations as easy as sending a text
articles.summary: 一款名为Poke的AI智能体面向普通用户推出，它依托短信为用户提供服务，可帮用户处理任务、搭建自动化流程。用户使用该服务无需复杂配置，不用下载额外应用，也不需要掌握专业技术知识。
articles.summary_original: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

articles.title: Canva收购Simtheory与Ortto 加码AI及营销自动化
articles.title_original: Canva doubles down on AI and marketing automation with Simtheory, Ortto acquisitions
articles.summary: 知名创意设计平台Canva宣布完成对Simtheory与Ortto两家企业的收购，本次收购将帮助Canva补强智能体人工智能、数据基础设施、营销自动化与客户互动领域的能力，深化相关业务布局。
articles.summary_original: Canva says the acquisitions add strengths in agentic AI, data infrastructure, marketing automation, and customer engagement.

articles.title: 以色列对黎巴嫩发动大规模空袭 造成至少182人死亡
articles.title_original: At least 182 killed across Lebanon in large wave of Israeli strikes
articles.summary: 美伊宣布停火数小时后，以色列对黎巴嫩发起大范围空袭，打击范围覆盖黎巴嫩首都贝鲁特南郊、黎巴嫩南部以及东部的贝卡谷地，此次空袭已造成黎巴嫩全境至少182人死亡。
articles.summary_original: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

articles.title: 与伊朗有关联的黑客扰乱美国关键基础设施站点运营
articles.title_original: Iran-linked hackers disrupt operations at US critical infrastructure sites
articles.summary: 随着美国和以色列的战事持续升级，针对美国境内工业场所的网络攻击活动也同步增长，近期与伊朗有关联的黑客发动攻击，已经扰乱了美国多个关键基础设施站点的正常运营。
articles.summary_original: As the US and Israel's war has ramped up, so too have hacks on US industrial sites.

articles.title: 关于美伊两周停火的已知信息
articles.title_original: What we know about the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran
articles.summary: 近期美伊达成了为期两周的临时停火，此次停火达成于美国与以色列联手对伊朗发起协同进攻一个多月之后，中东局势的这一新动向引发国际社会高度关注，各方正密切关注停火的后续落实与发展走向。
articles.summary_original: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

articles.title: 格拉杜脱党后 加拿大马克·卡尼有望率自由党取得议会多数
articles.title_original: Canada’s Mark Carney Poised to Secure Liberal Party Majority After Gladu’s Defection
articles.summary: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼领导的自由党，在议员格拉杜脱党之后，预计将赢得两场议会特别选举，有望借此取得议会多数席位，这将让现任自由党政府在加拿大议会中获得更大的施政权力。
articles.summary_original: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s Liberal Party is expected to win two special elections that could give the government broader powers in Parliament.

articles.title: OpenAI提出经济提案 美国华府对此持何看法
articles.title_original: OpenAI made economic proposals — here’s what DC thinks of them
articles.summary: 本内容出自科技媒体The Verge面向订阅用户推出的通讯《Regulator》，该通讯聚焦大型科技企业在政治领域的坎坷发展进程，最新一期开篇适逢停火日，邀请未订阅用户注册订阅，提及需关注特朗普是否会重启此前对伊朗的威胁。
articles.summary_original: Happy ceasefire day and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about Big Tech's rocky journey through the world of politics. If you're not a subscriber yet, you can do so here, but my only request is that you sign up before Donald Trump decides to revisit his previous threats toward Iran and kickstart […]

articles.title: OpenAI提出经济主张，华盛顿方面作何看法
articles.title_original: OpenAI made economic proposals — here’s what DC thinks of them
articles.summary: 这是科技媒体The Verge推出的聚焦大型科技企业涉政发展历程的订阅通讯《Regulator》的某期开篇。本期适逢停火日，将探讨OpenAI提出经济主张后美国华盛顿政界的态度，同时呼吁未订阅用户订阅，提及需警惕特朗普或重启对伊朗的威胁。
articles.summary_original: Happy ceasefire day and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about Big Tech's rocky journey through the world of politics. If you're not a subscriber yet, you can do so here, but my only request is that you sign up before Donald Trump decides to revisit his previous threats toward Iran and kickstart […]

articles.title: AWS负责人解释为何同时投资Anthropic和OpenAI数十亿美元不构成冲突
articles.title_original: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
articles.summary: 针对外界质疑同时向Anthropic和OpenAI投入数十亿美元存在利益冲突，AWS负责人回应称，AWS本身拥有根深蒂固的竞争文化，作为云服务巨头，AWS本身就常和自身合作伙伴展开竞争，因此这类冲突是可接受的。
articles.summary_original: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

articles.title: AWS主管解释为何同时投资Anthropic与OpenAI数十亿美元不存在冲突
articles.title_original: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
articles.summary: 针对同时向Anthropic与OpenAI投入数十亿美元引发的利益冲突质疑，AWS负责人回应称，AWS作为云服务巨头，本身就有着与自身合作伙伴竞争的固有文化，具备处理这类竞争的成熟机制，因此这笔投资不存在冲突问题。
articles.summary_original: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

articles.title: 各国领导人虽赞伊朗停火，仍遭特朗普反复摆布
articles.title_original: Even as They Praise Iran Cease-Fire, World Leaders Are Whipsawed by Trump
articles.summary: 伊朗局势引发的冲突对欧洲乃至全球造成多重冲击，不仅损害各国经济，搅乱政治秩序，更凸显出面对美国总统特朗普反复无常的行事风格，全球各国普遍缺乏有效的应对方案。
articles.summary_original: Across Europe and the globe, the war has damaged economies, roiled politics and underscored a lack of options in dealing with President Trump’s whims.

articles.title: 亚马逊将停止支持旧款Kindle设备
articles.title_original: Amazon to end support for older Kindle devices
articles.summary: 亚马逊本周通知Kindle设备所有者，将停止对所有2012年及更早发布的Kindle电子书阅读器提供支持，停止服务后，这些受影响的旧款设备将几乎无法加载任何新的电子阅读内容。
articles.summary_original: Amazon told Kindle owners this week that it's ending support for all e-readers released in 2012 or earlier, making them virtually unable to load any new content.

articles.title: 我终于见到了iPhone Air
articles.title_original: I finally get the iPhone Air
articles.summary: 上个月在世界移动通信大会上，笔者见到了不少设计奇特的手机，包括机器人手机、伪装成手机的相机、供狗狗使用的机型等。最让笔者意外的是，身为The Verge前员工的友人萨姆·拜福德在聚餐时带来了iPhone Air，这令笔者十分惊讶。
articles.summary_original: I saw a lot of weird phones at Mobile World Congress last month: robot phones, cameras disguised as phones, phones for dogs. But the one that caught me most off guard was the one my friend (and Verge alum) Sam Byford brought to dinner: an iPhone Air. "Ha!" I said. "You actually use that thing?" […]

articles.title: AI内存短缺也推高SSD价格
articles.title_original: The AI RAM shortage is also driving up SSD prices
articles.summary: 受AI发展引发的内存短缺影响，SSD价格正大幅上涨。一名用户2024年曾以173美元购入用于游戏PC的WD Black SN850X 2TB SSD，自2025年11月至今，该款SSD售价已涨至649美元，涨幅近三倍，价格超过其电脑多数配件总价。
articles.summary_original: I thought the WD Black SN850X 2TB SSD in my gaming PC was pricey when I bought it for $173 in 2024, but now that same SSD costs $649, more than what I paid for most of the parts in my PC combined. The price on my WD Black drive nearly quadrupled since November 2025, […]

articles.title: Meta推出Muse Spark模型，从零重构旗下AI
articles.title_original: Meta debuts the Muse Spark model in a ‘ground-up overhaul’ of its AI
articles.summary: Meta正式推出全新人工智能模型Muse Spark，本次发布是Meta对旗下AI业务从零开始的全面重构。该模型是Meta超级智能实验室发布的首个成果，该实验室由前Scale AI首席执行官亚历山大·王领衔。
articles.summary_original: This is the first model Meta has released under its Superintelligence Labs, led by former Scale AI CEO Alexandr Wang.

articles.title: 受雇黑客团伙被曝针对安卓设备与iCloud备份发起攻击
articles.title_original: Hack-for-hire group caught targeting Android devices and iCloud backups
articles.summary: 安全研究人员近日曝光一起受雇黑客团伙发起的间谍窃密活动，该团伙利用安卓间谍软件与网络钓鱼手段，窃取受害者的iCloud账号凭证，进而非法入侵受害者的个人设备。
articles.summary_original: Security researchers exposed a spying campaign by a hack-for-hire group that used Android spyware and phishing to steal iCloud credentials and hack victims’ devices.

articles.title: 伊朗官员称中国推动伊朗停火
articles.title_original: China Pressed Iran Toward Cease-Fire, Iranian Officials Say
articles.summary: 伊朗官员透露，中国推动伊朗接受了伊朗与美国达成的为期两周的停火协议，这体现出中国影响力日益提升，也反映出中国在避免地区爆发更大范围战争上存在利害关系。
articles.summary_original: Beijing appeared to have helped push Tehran to accept the two-week deal with the United States, reflecting China’s growing influence and its stake in avoiding a wider war.

articles.title: 希腊拟禁止15岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
articles.title_original: Greece Plans to Block Social Media for Children Under 15
articles.summary: 希腊计划禁止15岁以下儿童使用社交媒体。目前全球多个国家正推进限制青少年访问社交网站的相关工作，澳大利亚、西班牙等国已通过相关禁令，另有不少国家也在制定对应限制方案。
articles.summary_original: Countries including Australia, Spain and others have already passed bans or are working on plans to restrict teenagers’ access to social sites.

articles.title: 即便霍尔木兹海峡重新开放，油价也不会快速回落至战前水平
articles.title_original: Gas Prices Won’t Quickly Return to Prewar Levels, Even if the Strait of Hormuz Reopens
articles.summary: 地缘冲突推高国际油价后，市场十分关注油价能否快速回落至战前水平。分析指出，即便霍尔木兹海峡恢复通行，部分油井虽可在数天至数周内复产，但整个海湾能源体系恢复常态仍需数月，油价难快速回落至战前水平。
articles.summary_original: Some wells can be turned on in days or weeks, but bringing the Gulf’s energy system back to something akin to normal will take months.

articles.title: Tubi成首个在ChatGPT内推出原生应用的流媒体平台
articles.title_original: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
articles.summary: 流媒体服务商Tubi成为首个在AI聊天机器人ChatGPT内完成应用整合的流媒体平台。ChatGPT是拥有数百万用户的热门AI工具，全球大量用户日常都会使用这款聊天机器人获取各类问题的解答。
articles.summary_original: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

articles.title: Tubi成为首个在ChatGPT内推出原生应用的流媒体平台
articles.title_original: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
articles.summary: 拥有数百万用户的ChatGPT是一款供用户获取问题解答的热门AI聊天机器人。流媒体服务商Tubi成为全球首个在ChatGPT内完成原生应用整合的流媒体平台，率先实现了流媒体服务与AI聊天工具的原生内嵌对接。
articles.summary_original: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

articles.title: Neo效应：苹果最便宜Mac如何改写PC格局
articles.title_original: The Neo Effect: How Apple’s cheapest Mac is changing the PC game
articles.summary: 全新MacBook Neo正冲击笔记本市场，它是苹果目前售价最低的Mac，起售价599美元，师生可享499美元优惠价，让苹果首次跻身高性价比PC选项之列。该机搭载源自旧款苹果移动设备的A18 Pro芯片，性能绰绰有余。
articles.summary_original: The MacBook Neo is disrupting the laptop space and putting Apple into the conversation as a value option like it’s never been before. With a price starting at $599 (or $499 for students and teachers), the colorful laptop’s A18 Pro chip may be stolen from older iPads and iPhones, but it offers more than enough […]

articles.title: 伊朗霍尔木兹海峡警告加剧航运不确定性
articles.title_original: Iran Strait of Hormuz warning adds to shipping uncertainty
articles.summary: 伊朗针对霍尔木兹海峡发出的相关警告，进一步加剧了全球航运领域的不确定性。BBC核查部门分析显示，美伊达成停火协议以来，仅有少量船只通行霍尔木兹海峡，航运市场不确定性仍居高不下。
articles.summary_original: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.

articles.title: 大众在洛杉矶开启自动驾驶小巴测试 将与优步合作推出服务
articles.title_original: Volkswagen begins testing its self-driving microbuses in Los Angeles ahead of launch with Uber
articles.summary: 大众近日在洛杉矶启动自动驾驶小巴测试，该商用自动驾驶出行服务后续将与优步合作推出。大众旗下MOIA美国公司要落地商用自动驾驶出租车服务，仍需走完漫长曲折的监管流程，正式推出尚需时日。
articles.summary_original: Volkswagen subsidiary MOIA America still has a long and winding regulatory road before it can launch a commercial robotaxi service.

articles.title: 微软高管变动持续 开发者部门主管辞职
articles.title_original: Microsoft’s executive shake-up continues as developer division chief resigns
articles.summary: 微软再失资深高管，在这家软件巨头供职34年的开发者部门负责人朱丽娅·柳森宣布辞职。柳森执掌微软开发者业务长达12年，任职期间微软加大对开源项目布局，完成了75亿美元收购GitHub的交易。
articles.summary_original: Microsoft is losing another veteran executive. Julia Liuson, head of Microsoft's developer division (DevDiv), is resigning from the software giant after 34 years. Liuson spent the past 12 years leading Microsoft's developer business, during a period Microsoft focused more on open source projects and acquired GitHub for $7.5 billion. Liuson will continue as head of […]

articles.title: Meta推出全新模型Muse Spark 重返AI竞赛
articles.title_original: Meta is reentering the AI race with a new model called Muse Spark
articles.summary: 扎克伯格投入数十亿美元重整公司AI业务后，Meta超级智能实验室推出首个AI模型Muse Spark。官方公告显示，目前该模型已为美国地区的Meta AI应用及官网提供支持，未来几周将登陆Meta旗下多个社交平台。
articles.summary_original: Meta Superintelligence Labs is launching its first model since Mark Zuckerberg spent billions overhauling the company's AI efforts. Called Muse Spark, the model now powers the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US, per the company's announcement. In the coming weeks, Meta says, it will appear in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, […]

articles.title: Meta携新款模型Muse Spark重返AI赛道
articles.title_original: Meta is reentering the AI race with a new model called Muse Spark
articles.summary: 扎克伯格投入数十亿美元重整公司AI业务后，Meta超级智能实验室推出首款模型Muse Spark。目前该模型已在美国为Meta AI应用及官网提供支持，Meta称未来几周它将登陆旗下多款社交产品。
articles.summary_original: Meta Superintelligence Labs is launching its first model since Mark Zuckerberg spent billions overhauling the company's AI efforts. Called Muse Spark, the model now powers the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US, per the company's announcement. In the coming weeks, Meta says, it will appear in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, […]

articles.title: Astropad Workbench重构面向AI智能体而非IT支持的远程桌面
articles.title_original: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
articles.summary: 科技厂商Astropad推出Workbench工具，重新打造适配AI智能体而非传统IT支持的远程桌面服务。用户可通过iPhone或iPad，远程监控与控制Mac Mini上的AI智能体，该工具支持低延迟流传输与移动访问。
articles.summary_original: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

articles.title: 亚马逊智能恒温器可帮降能源账单 售价降至62美元
articles.title_original: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help lower your energy bills, and it’s down to $62
articles.summary: 随着气温升高、地球日临近，尚未购置智能恒温器的消费者迎来合适入手时机。该款智能恒温器可在不影响使用舒适度的前提下减少能耗、降低能源开支，目前在亚马逊平台直降18美元，售价仅约62美元。
articles.summary_original: With temperatures on the rise and Earth Day right around the corner, now’s a good time to invest in a smart thermostat if you haven’t already. A good one like Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help reduce energy use and lower your bills without sacrificing comfort, and right now it’s just $61.99 ($18 off) at Amazon. […]

articles.title: OpenAI发布全新安全蓝图 应对儿童性剥削问题激增
articles.title_original: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
articles.summary: 当前，与人工智能技术发展相关的儿童性剥削问题呈现出令人担忧的上升趋势，OpenAI为此发布全新儿童安全蓝图，旨在应对这一问题的增长，筑牢人工智能领域的儿童安全防线，遏制侵害儿童权益的相关有害行为蔓延。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

articles.title: 德国暂停45岁以下男性长期出国停留的军事审批
articles.title_original: Germany suspends military approval for long stays abroad for men under 45
articles.summary: 德国宣布暂停针对45岁以下男性长期出国停留的军事审批。要求该群体申请长期出国停留需获军方审批的规定，此前一直未受到广泛关注，直至一家德国报纸报道后才进入公众视野。
articles.summary_original: The requirement to obtain permission had gone largely unnoticed until a German newspaper reported on it.
